communityconfiguration-desc: Wuxuu ka kooban yahay maangalka qaabaynta Beesha
communityconfiguration-editor-chip-contr: Riix Geli si aad wax u saxdo ama Delete si aad u tirtirto
communityconfiguration-editor-client-gen: Wax baa khaldamay markii la soo gelinayay tifaftiraha dejinta. Fadlan mar kale isku day mar dambe.
Khalad ayaa ka dhacay '$2' gudaha qaybta $1. Faahfaahinta hoos ka eeg:
communityconfiguration-editor-client-pos: Haddii dhibaatadu sii socoto, ka fiirso [$1 inaad ka tagto faallo] bogga wada hadalka.
communityconfiguration-editor-client-val: Waxaa {{PLURAL:$1|ku jira qalad|ku jira $1 khaladaad}} foomka:
communityconfiguration-guidelines-descri: Isku xirka Bulshada waa qalab u oggolaanaya bulshooyinka inay dejiyaan oo xakameeyaan dejinta astaamo kala duwan oo {{SITENAME}} ah, iyadoo ka caawinaysa maamulka inay la jaanqaadaan baahiyaha gaarka ah ee bulshadooda.
communityconfiguration-guidelines-guidel: [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Help:Community_configuration Baro wax badan] oo ku saabsan Isku xirka Bulshada, waxa ay tahay, sida ay u shaqeyso, iyo shaqada socda ee kooxda ee ku saabsan.
Waxaan jeclaan lahayn inaan maqallaa {{GENDER:$1|ra'yigaaga}}! Nagala soo xiriir [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Talk:Growth bogga wadahadalka] ee nala leeyihiin.
communityconfiguration-invalid-stored-co: Waa lagu guuldarraystay in la soo raro dejin sax ah oo ka timid bixiyaha $1 (koodh $2).
Waa lagu guuldarraystay in la soo raro dejin sax ah oo ka timid bixiyaha $1 (koodh $2), eeg $3.
communityconfiguration-edit-summary-remi: Xusuusin: Isbeddelkan wuxuu saameyn karaa tiro badan oo ka tirsan xubnaha bulshada, fadlan tixgeli inaad sharaxdo sababta {{GENDER:$1|aad}} u sameyneyso isbeddelkan iyo inaad ku xusto doodaha bulshada ee la xiriira haddii ay habboon tahay.
communityconfiguration-editor-client-dat: Wax baa khaldamay markii la kaydinayay {{GENDER:$1|isbeddelladaada}}. Fadlan mar kale isku day mar dambe.
communityconfiguration-editor-nojs-fallb: Tifaftiraha dejintu wuxuu u baahan yahay JavaScript. Fadlan awood JavaScript si aad u isticmaasho.
communityconfiguration-editor-client-not: Boggan waa la ilaaliyay. Dejinta astaantan waxaa wax ka beddeli kara kaliya maamulka.
{{GENDER:$1|Adigu}} ma kaydin kartid isbeddellada foomkan sababtoo ah dejinta astaantan waxaa wax ka beddeli kara kaliya maamulka.
communityconfiguration-editor-error-vali: Waa in ugu badnaan ay ku jiraan {{PLURAL:$1|$1 shey|$1 sheyo}} arrayga
Waa in ay jiraan ugu yaraan {{PLURAL:$1|$1 shay|$1 shayo}} gudaha liiska
Ma laha qiime ku jira liiska la oggol yahay: $1
communityconfiguration-maintenance-confi: Isku xirka waxaa beddelay fariinta dayactirka: $1
tag-community_configuration-description: Wax ka beddellada beddelaya [[Special:CommunityConfiguration|isku xirka wiki ee deegaanka]] ee muuqaal isticmaalaya [[mw:Extension:CommunityConfiguration|kordhinta Isku xirka Bulshada]].
